prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of AMZN, the stock typically exhibits an annualized volatility of approximately 35-40%. For a 21-day period, this translates to roughly 7-9% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes modest upward momentum typical of tech stocks over 3-week periods. Confidence intervals are constructed using log-normal distribution assumptions with wider ranges reflecting increased uncertainty over longer time horizons and potential market volatility from earnings, economic data, or sector rotation effects.
